data.name: Home_Subtitle
data.value: Track, measure, and improve your daily actions

data.name: Home_NoActionsHint
data.value: Create your first tracked action to start logging entries.

data.name: Home_WelcomeHint
data.value: Track, measure, and improve your daily actions.

data.name: Home_NoMatchingActions
data.value: No actions match the current filters.

data.name: Auth_RegisterSuccess
data.value: Registration successful! Please check your email to confirm your account, then login.

data.name: Auth_ForgotPasswordHint
data.value: Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset code.

data.name: Auth_ResetCodeSent
data.value: If an account with that email exists, a reset link has been sent.

data.name: Auth_ResetLinkSent
data.value: If an account with that email exists, a password reset link has been sent. Please check your inbox.

data.name: Auth_ResetSuccess
data.value: Password reset successfully! You can now login with your new password.

data.name: TrackedActions_Subtitle
data.value: Manage your tracked actions and monitor progress

data.name: TrackedActions_Empty
data.value: No tracked actions yet. Create one to get started!

data.name: ActionCreate_Subtitle
data.value: Set up a new action with fields and tags

data.name: Dashboard_NoActionsMatch
data.value: No actions match the selected filter.

data.name: Dashboard_NoEntriesYet
data.value: No entries yet for this action.

data.name: Entries_Subtitle
data.value: Browse and manage all your logged entries

data.name: Tags_Subtitle
data.value: Organize your tracked actions with color-coded tags

data.name: Tags_Empty
data.value: No tags yet. Create one to get started!

data.name: Fields_Subtitle
data.value: Define reusable field templates that can be assigned to tracked actions

data.name: Fields_Empty
data.value: No field definitions yet. Create one to get started!

data.name: Fields_UnitHint
data.value: The measurement unit for this field (defaults to UN).

data.name: Fields_DropdownHint
data.value: Enter comma-separated values for the dropdown options.

data.name: Fields_DropdownPlaceholder
data.value: Comma-separated values, e.g.: Low, Medium, High

data.name: DropdownEditor_Placeholder
data.value: Type a value and press Enter…

data.name: DropdownEditor_HintEmpty
data.value: Type a value and press Enter to add it. Paste a comma-separated list to add multiple at once.

data.name: DropdownEditor_HintSingular
data.value: 1 value — click/tap to edit, × to remove

data.name: DropdownEditor_HintPlural
data.value: {0} values — click/tap to edit, × to remove

data.name: Fields_SourceDropdownsHint
data.value: Select the dropdown fields whose values will be aggregated into this composite dropdown, grouped by field name.

data.name: Fields_NoDropdownsAvailable
data.value: No dropdown fields exist yet. Create regular dropdown fields first.

data.name: Fields_CompositeNoDefault
data.value: Default value is inherited from source fields.

data.name: FieldEditor_DropdownTrendHint
data.value: Track how a numeric field evolves over time for each dropdown value (e.g., spending per store over time).

data.name: FieldEditor_InitialValueHint
data.value: Choose how this field is pre-filled when creating a new entry.

data.name: Settings_LanguageHint
data.value: Select your preferred language. The app will reload to apply.

data.name: Settings_PasswordFillAll
data.value: Please fill in all password fields.

data.name: Settings_PasswordNoMatch
data.value: New password and confirmation do not match.

data.name: Settings_PasswordTooShort
data.value: New password must be at least 6 characters.

data.name: Settings_DeleteAccountWarning
data.value: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Settings_DeleteConfirmation
data.value: Are you sure? This will permanently delete your account and all your tracked actions, entries, field definitions, and tags.

data.name: NewField_LinkParentHint
data.value: Creates a dependency rule for the currently selected value.

data.name: ActionEdit_FieldsHint
data.value: Manage the data fields captured for each entry. Click a field to edit its settings.

data.name: ActionEdit_TagsHint
data.value: Manage which tags are assigned to this action.

data.name: NotFound_Message
data.value: Sorry, there's nothing at this address.

data.name: Edit_FieldsHint
data.value: Manage the data fields captured for each entry. Click a field to edit its settings.

data.name: Edit_TagsHint
data.value: Manage which tags are assigned to this action.

data.name: Modal_NoTagsAvailable
data.value: No tags available. Create one below.

data.name: Modal_NoFieldsAvailable
data.value: No field definitions available. Create one below.

data.name: FieldEdit_CreateSubtitle
data.value: Define a new reusable field template

data.name: Wizard_ActionNotFound
data.value: Action created but could not be found.

data.name: Wizard_NoTagsHint
data.value: No tags selected. Tags help you organize and filter your tracked actions.

data.name: Wizard_NoFieldsHint
data.value: No fields selected. Fields define what data you capture per entry.

data.name: Wizard_CustomFieldsHint
data.value: Since you've defined fields, entries need to be created after the action is set up — so all field values can be properly filled in.

data.name: Wizard_RedirectToEntry
data.value: Take me to add the first entry after creation

data.name: Wizard_WillRedirect
data.value: You'll be redirected to add the first entry after creation

data.name: Wizard_EntriesAfterCreation
data.value: Entries can be added after creation (custom fields need to be filled in)

data.name: Wizard_NoEntriesHint
data.value: No entries added yet. You can add entries now or do it later from the home page.

data.name: Dashboard_NoDataHint
data.value: Create some tracked actions and log entries to see your dashboard.

data.name: Dashboard_StatsSubtitle
data.value: Statistics and insights about your tracked actions

data.name: Validation_MinGreaterThanMax
data.value: Min value cannot be greater than max value.

data.name: Validation_DefaultLessThanMin
data.value: Default value cannot be less than min value ({0}).

data.name: Validation_DefaultGreaterThanMax
data.value: Default value cannot be greater than max value ({0}).

data.name: Validation_MinDateAfterMax
data.value: Min date cannot be later than max date.

data.name: Validation_DefaultDateBeforeMin
data.value: Default date cannot be earlier than min date ({0}).

data.name: Validation_DefaultDateAfterMax
data.value: Default date cannot be later than max date ({0}).

data.name: Fields_CreatedNotRetrieved
data.value: Field created but could not be retrieved.

data.name: Auth_EmailConfirmed
data.value: Your email has been confirmed! You can now

data.name: Auth_ConfirmEmailFailed
data.value: Email confirmation failed. The link may have expired.

data.name: Auth_EmailNotConfirmed
data.value: Your email is not confirmed. Please check your inbox or

data.name: Auth_ConfirmationResent
data.value: Confirmation email resent! Please check your inbox.

data.name: Auth_ExternalLoginFailed
data.value: External login failed. Please try again.

data.name: Settings_ExportHint
data.value: Download all your data (actions, entries, fields, tags) as a JSON file. Useful for backups or transferring to another account.

data.name: Settings_ImportHint
data.value: Upload a previously exported Traceon JSON file to restore your data.

data.name: Settings_ImportWarning
data.value: Importing will create new items, not overwrite existing ones. Duplicate data may result if you import the same file twice.

data.name: Settings_ImportFailed
data.value: Failed to import data. Check file format.

data.name: Feedback_Subtitle
data.value: Help us improve Traceon by reporting bugs or suggesting features.

data.name: Feedback_Placeholder
data.value: Describe the issue, suggestion, or feedback...

data.name: Feedback_Success
data.value: Thank you! Your feedback has been sent.

data.name: Feedback_Failed
data.value: Failed to send feedback. Please try again.

data.name: Onboard_Hint
data.value: Get started quickly by choosing a template pack, or create your own actions from scratch.

data.name: Template_Health_Desc
data.value: Track blood pressure, weight, glucose and more.

data.name: Template_Health_Weight_Desc
data.value: Track your body weight over time.

data.name: Template_Fitness_Desc
data.value: Log workouts, running, steps and more.

data.name: Template_Fitness_Workout_Desc
data.value: Track exercise type, duration and calories.

data.name: Template_Habits_Desc
data.value: Build healthy routines: sleep, water, reading.

data.name: Template_Habits_Sleep_Desc
data.value: Track hours and quality of sleep.

data.name: Template_Habits_Water_Desc
data.value: Count glasses of water per day.

data.name: Template_Finance_Transaction_Desc
data.value: Track income and expenses with a running balance.

data.name: Templates_Subtitle
data.value: Browse and install pre-built action packs to get started quickly.

data.name: Templates_InstallFailed
data.value: Failed to install template. Please try again.

data.name: Settings_LinkedAccountsHint
data.value: External providers linked to your account for sign-in.

data.name: Settings_RemoveLoginConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to unlink {0}?

data.name: Settings_RemoveLoginNoPassword
data.value: This is your only login method and you have no password set. Please set a password before removing this provider.

data.name: Settings_LoginRemoved
data.value: {0} has been unlinked from your account.

data.name: Analytics_CrossFieldHint
data.value: Aggregations of one field grouped by another

data.name: Analytics_NoCrossFieldRules
data.value: No analytics rules configured for this action.

data.name: Analytics_CountByValueHint
data.value: Count counts entries per group. Count by Value shows how each measure value is distributed within each group.

data.name: Analytics_ValueFieldHint
data.value: Optionally select a numeric field to aggregate alongside counts (e.g., sum of Amount per category).

data.name: Analytics_RulesHint
data.value: Define how fields relate to each other for dashboard insights.

data.name: Analytics_SelectBothFields
data.value: Please select both a measure field and a group-by field.

data.name: Analytics_SignedSumHint
data.value: Choose a dropdown field that determines sign. Values marked as negative will be subtracted in the total (e.g., Expense → −Amount).

data.name: Analytics_NeedTwoFields
data.value: You need at least two fields (one numeric) to create analytics rules. Add fields in the Fields tab first.

data.name: Dep_Hint
data.value: Define how dropdown fields depend on each other. When a source value is selected, the target dropdown shows only the allowed values.

data.name: Dep_PickSourceValue
data.value: Select a value on the left to configure its allowed target values.

data.name: Dep_NoDropdownValues
data.value: One or both selected fields have no dropdown values configured.

data.name: Dep_NeedTwoDropdowns
data.value: You need at least two dropdown fields to create dependency rules. Add dropdown fields in the Fields tab first.

data.name: Dep_SelectBothFields
data.value: Please select both a source and target field.

data.name: Dep_SelectAllowedValues
data.value: Please select at least one allowed value for the target field.

data.name: Hierarchy_Step1Hint
data.value: Name the levels of your hierarchy (e.g. Category, Sub-category, Detail).

data.name: Hierarchy_Step2Hint
data.value: Build the tree of values. For each parent, add the child values allowed under it.

data.name: Hierarchy_Step3Hint
data.value: Review the structure that will be created.

data.name: Trash_Subtitle
data.value: Deleted items are kept for your configured retention period before permanent removal.

data.name: Settings_DataRetentionHint
data.value: Choose how long deleted items are kept before being permanently removed.

data.name: Settings_DataRetentionInfo
data.value: Deleted items older than this period will be permanently removed by the background cleanup job.

data.name: Receipt_Subtitle
data.value: Scan a receipt or ticket and import items as tracked entries.

data.name: Receipt_UploadHint
data.value: Take a photo or select an image of your grocery receipt. Supported formats: JPEG, PNG, HEIF, PDF.

data.name: Receipt_MergeNoConflicts
data.value: No conflicting values — rows will be merged automatically.

data.name: Receipt_ShiftHint
data.value: Click rows to select them, then use ↑↓ to shift prices within the selection only. If no rows are selected, all rows are affected.

data.name: Receipt_ShiftHintMobile
data.value: Tap rows to select, then use ↑↓ to shift prices within selection.

data.name: Receipt_DraftHint
data.value: You have unfinished receipt scans. Resume where you left off or start a new one.

data.name: Receipt_DraftRestoreFailed
data.value: Failed to restore the draft. Please start a new scan.

data.name: Receipt_ScanFailed
data.value: Failed to scan the receipt. Please try again with a clearer image.

data.name: Receipt_SelectActionHint
data.value: Choose the tracked action where receipt items will be imported. Only actions with receipt import enabled are shown.

data.name: Receipt_NoActions
data.value: No actions with receipt import enabled. Enable it in the action's Receipt Import tab first.

data.name: Receipt_MapFieldsHint
data.value: Configure how each action field gets its value from the receipt data.

data.name: Receipt_FieldMappingHint
data.value: For each action field, choose a receipt source or set a fixed value. You can still override individual items below.

data.name: Receipt_NewValuesWillBeCreated
data.value: New dropdown values will be created

data.name: Receipt_NewValuesInfo
data.value: New dropdown values will be automatically added to the corresponding field definitions.

data.name: Receipt_ImportFailed
data.value: Failed to import entries. Please try again.

data.name: Receipt_BatchAssignHint
data.value: Set a value for all included items at once. You can still override individual items below.

data.name: RcptCfg_Hint
data.value: Configure how receipt scans are imported into this action. Map OCR fields to action fields and define text patterns for auto-categorization.

data.name: RcptCfg_FieldMappingHint
data.value: Map receipt data to your action fields. Total is required; others are optional.

data.name: RcptCfg_MappingRulesHint
data.value: Define text patterns to auto-assign dropdown values when item descriptions match. Use commas to match multiple keywords (e.g. "banana,apple,orange" → Fruit). Higher priority rules are checked first.

data.name: RcptCfg_NoRulesYet
data.value: No auto-categorization rules yet. Add rules so receipt items are categorized automatically.

data.name: RcptCfg_EditRuleHint
data.value: Add a new keyword to the existing rule pattern:

data.name: Receipt_RuleSaveFailed
data.value: Failed to save the rule. Please try again.

data.name: RcptCfg_NeedsDecimalField
data.value: This action needs at least one Decimal field to enable receipt import.

data.name: RcptCfg_NotConfigured
data.value: Receipt import not configured for this action.

data.name: Bulk_EditHint
data.value: Check the properties you want to update and set the new values. Only checked properties will be changed.

data.name: Bulk_OperationFailed
data.value: Bulk operation failed. Please try again.
